summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: number-line from 0 to 2 with YELLOW target π²/6 marker. ValueTracker N_tr grows 1→40; always_redraw a row of BLUE→RED colored bars representing successive terms 1/k² placed left-to-right (cumulative), with a GREEN marker at the running partial sum S_N. Live panel shows N, S_N, gap = π²/6 − S_N, and gap ∼ 1/N.
